nasb.text: Not that we are adequate in ourselves to consider anything as coming from ourselves, but our adequacy is from God,

esv.text: Not that we are sufficient in ourselves to claim anything as coming from us, but our sufficiency is from God,

cnv.text: 我們不敢以為自己有資格作甚麼，我們所能夠作的是出於　神。

ccb.text: 我们并不认为自己能够承担什么，我们能够承担全是靠上帝。

csbs.text: 并不是说，我们凭自己配得上把什么算做出于自己；而是说，我们之所以配得上是出于神。
